spec.description: Metrics on system resources of the Airlock Microgateway.

spec.title: Memory Microgateway Engine
spec.description: Memory usage over time of the Airlock Microgateway Engine container.

spec.title: Engine Readiness
spec.description: Readiness status of the Airlock Microgateway Engine container.

spec.title: CPU Usage Microgateway Engine
spec.description: CPU usage over time of the Airlock Microgateway Engine container.

spec.title: Memory Envoy Server
spec.description: Allocated memory and heap size over time of the Envoy server in the Microgateway Engine container.

spec.title: Airlock Microgateway Engine Version
spec.description: Version of the Airlock Microgateway Engine container.

spec.title: Gateway Configuration Status
spec.description: Aggregated status of the resource conditions of the gateway instance.

spec.title: Envoy Server State Summary
spec.description: Indicator if all Envoy server states of the selected gateway are in state LIVE.

spec.title: Memory Microgateway Session Agent
spec.description: Memory usage over time of the Airlock Microgateway Session Agent container.

spec.title: CPU Usage Microgateway Session Agent
spec.description: CPU usage over time of the Airlock Microgateway Session Agent container.

spec.title: Session Agent Readiness
spec.description: Readiness status of the Airlock Microgateway Session Agent container.

spec.title: Airlock Microgateway System - Metrics

spec.name: namespace
spec.label: Gateway Namespace
spec.description: Allows filtering on the namespaces in which gateways are deployed.

spec.name: gateway_name
spec.label: Gateway Name
spec.description: Allows filtering on specific gateway instance names within the selected namespaces.

spec.name: pod
spec.label: Pod
spec.description: Allows to select the pod to display the system metrics for.
